platform.name: meta
platform.paid_media_notes: 10-second paid Reels. The hook must read as a sponsored Open Graph-style social card in the first second.

format.safe_area: Keep important copy in central 900x1500 px. Leave lower app UI zone clear except CTA.

objective.primary: Drive KASKO insurance consideration during Qurban holiday campaign.
objective.audience: Azerbaijani private passenger-car owners eligible for KASKO, excluding taxi, rent-a-car and passenger transport use cases.
objective.single_minded_message: Get KASKO insurance during the campaign and receive an Azpetrol fuel card gift.

brand.name: Xalq Sigorta
typography: Inter Tight or Manrope for headlines
rules: Xalq Sigorta logo is deterministic overlay or approved poster artwork only.
AZPETROL identity must remain green, clean, and recognizable.
Campaign terms, dates, prices, and CTA must be deterministic overlay.
No AI-generated new Azerbaijani copy in foreground.

offer.headline: Qurban bayramina ozel teklif
offer.subheadline: KASKO sigortasi al, yanacaq kartin hediyye olsun!
terms: Təklif yalnız bonus əmsalı 1.0-dan aşağı olan sürücülərə məxsus minik avtomobillərinə aiddir.
Taksi, rent a car və sərnişin daşımalarında istifadə olunan avtomobillər kampaniyaya daxil deyil.
Kampaniya buraxılış ili son 10 ilə qədər olan minik avtomobillərinə şamil olunur.
Kampaniya sığorta haqqı 750 AZN-dən yuxarı avtomobillər üçün nəzərdə tutulmuşdur.

assets.usage: Approved visual reference: fuel pump, red car, gift box, Azpetrol cards, holiday color system.
Open Graph-style vertical start-frame reference for composition and hook.

assets.path_or_url: embedded in approved campaign key visual; request separate vector from marketing when available
assets.usage: Partner brand reference and final overlay if separate vector is supplied.

storyboard.visual: A clean sponsored social preview card floats over a soft holiday campaign backdrop.
storyboard.motion: Gentle card float, slight push-in, soft green-red ambient sweep.
storyboard.overlay: Sponsored / Xalq Sigorta / Reels 9:16 / campaign headline.

storyboard.visual: The card opens into the KASKO campaign world: Azpetrol pump, red car, gift box and cards.
storyboard.motion: Controlled 3D parallax, light sweep across the fuel cards, no fast shake.

storyboard.visual: Three clean offer chips/cards appear over the branded motion plate.
storyboard.motion: Staggered slide-in with subtle shadow and settle.

storyboard.visual: Final clean card with approved campaign visual, logo lockup and CTA.
storyboard.motion: Slow settle, stable end frame for last 0.8 seconds.
storyboard.overlay: Avtomobilinizi qoruyun, yanacaq kartı qazanın / 25 may - 5 iyun / Xalq Sigorta x AZPETROL.

selection_criteria: Open Graph hook remains premium and readable
red car, fuel pump, gift box and fuel cards stay recognizable
no AI-generated foreground text is required for final comprehension
motion feels like paid social, not random cinematic drift
final frame is stable enough for CTA and Meta thumbnail

text_policy.ai_text_rule: Do not generate final readable Azerbaijani campaign copy. Generate motion plate and card movement; exact copy is added as deterministic overlay.
overlay_text: KASKO al, yanacaq kartın hədiyyə olsun!

reject_if: Azerbaijani text is generated or visibly malformed in foreground
Xalq Sigorta or AZPETROL identity is altered
the red car, fuel pump, gift cards or gift box are deformed
the offer is not understandable without audio
the final CTA is not readable for at least the last 0.8 seconds
approve_if: the first second reads as a high-quality sponsored social card
the motion plate supports the approved poster concept
all final copy is locked as overlay text
terms are simplified without contradicting the legal brief
the video is ready for Meta Reels upload
